dj_text: Katyusha (Medieval Cover), and now The National Anthem of the USA (Medieval Cover). The Django demands it. Small but mighty. 3 more in the tank.
commercial_text: This break was supposed to be an ad but we forgot to sell one. So here's 10 seconds of me making mouth noises. mmm.
hijack_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm.
recovery_text: We're back. That was NOT a crossover event. That was a dimensional bleed.
title: The National Anthem of the USA (Medieval Cover)
